center.name: Bakossi Forest Reserve
center.summary: Bakossi Forest Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mount Kupe bushshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was previously thought to be endemic to Cameroon, where it is found in the Bakossi Forest Reserve and in particular on Mount Kupe, where it has been known to attract ecotourists.Cheek, Martin, and Jean Michel Onana

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It was previously thought to be endemic to Cameroon, where it is found in the Bakossi Forest Reserve and in particular on Mount Kupe, where it has been known to attract ecotourists.Cheek, Martin, and Jean Michel Onana
